summary: Honour --follow=false in tail.go by returning after the initial fetch instead of dropping into the infinite ticker loop.
reason: Greptile P1 review finding on PR #676 (fourth pass): the follow flag was declared and bound but never read, so --follow=false silently behaved like the default and ran the poll loop until SIGTERM/SIGINT. Any script or agent relying on --follow=false for single-poll-then-exit would hang.
